prompt: I need to build a dashboard for my SaaS app using Mantine. It should have a sidebar navbar, header, and main content area. I want it to be responsive so the sidebar collapses on mobile.
expected_output: A complete React/Next.js component using Mantine's AppShell, with responsive sidebar, header, and main content area. Should use @mantine/core components like AppShell, Navbar, Header, Burger, etc. with proper responsive breakpoints.

assertions.name: uses-appshell
assertions.text: Uses Mantine AppShell component

assertions.name: responsive-burger
assertions.text: Uses separate mobile/desktop Burger toggles with hiddenFrom/visibleFrom

assertions.name: navlink-navigation
assertions.text: Uses NavLink for sidebar navigation items

assertions.name: responsive-collapse
assertions.text: AppShell navbar has breakpoint and collapsed.mobile/collapsed.desktop props

assertions.name: uses-mantine-hooks
assertions.text: Uses useDisclosure from @mantine/hooks for toggle state

assertions.name: color-scheme-toggle
assertions.text: Includes light/dark mode toggle using useMantineColorScheme

assertions.name: no-raw-css-heights
assertions.text: Does not use hardcoded pixel values for layout dimensions (uses Mantine spacing/sizing)

prompt: Create a user registration form with Mantine that has email, password (with confirmation), first name, last name, and agree to terms checkbox. All fields are required and email needs validation.
expected_output: A complete React component using useForm from @mantine/form with proper validation, Mantine input components, and form submission handling.

assertions.name: uses-useform
assertions.text: Uses useForm from @mantine/form

assertions.name: uncontrolled-mode
assertions.text: Uses mode: 'uncontrolled' (recommended)

assertions.name: form-keys
assertions.text: Uses key={form.key('fieldName')} on uncontrolled inputs

assertions.name: getInputProps
assertions.text: Uses form.getInputProps('fieldName') on all inputs

assertions.name: checkbox-type
assertions.text: Passes { type: 'checkbox' } to getInputProps for Checkbox

assertions.name: password-validation
assertions.text: Password confirmation validates against password value

assertions.name: email-validation
assertions.text: Email has regex validation

assertions.name: onSubmit-handler
assertions.text: Uses form.onSubmit() for form submission

assertions.name: mantine-inputs
assertions.text: Uses Mantine TextInput, PasswordInput, Checkbox, Button components

prompt: I'm using Mantine in my project and I want a card component that shows a user profile with their avatar on the left, name and role on the right, and a follow button. The card should have rounded corners, a subtle shadow, and look nice in both light and dark mode.
expected_output: A React component using Mantine Card, Avatar, Text, Button, Group with CSS modules or proper Mantine styling that works in both light and dark modes.

assertions.name: uses-mantine-card
assertions.text: Uses Mantine Card component

assertions.name: uses-mantine-avatar
assertions.text: Uses Mantine Avatar component

assertions.name: no-manual-dark-mode
assertions.text: Does not manually check color scheme via useMantineColorScheme for styling (relies on Mantine's semantic tokens/classes instead)

assertions.name: uses-classnames-not-styles
assertions.text: Uses classNames prop with CSS modules rather than inline styles prop

assertions.name: mantine-semantic-colors
assertions.text: Uses Mantine semantic color tokens (c='dimmed', etc.) instead of hardcoded colors

assertions.name: radius-shadow-props
assertions.text: Uses radius and shadow props on Card component rather than inline styles

assertions.name: no-deprecated-props
assertions.text: Does not use deprecated Mantine v6 props (noWrap, direction, spacing, weight, color)
